zh.Codnor, Basford, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾可德諾
zh.lifeSummary: Isolda Bardolf是Miss Bardolf的女兒，於1182年出生在英國肯特胡。她於1201年之前與Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1246年6月18日在英國德比夏爾可德諾享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾可德諾。

zh-hans.Codnor, Basford, Derbyshire, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾可德諾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isolda Bardolf是Miss Bardolf的女儿，于1182年出生在英国肯特胡。她于1201年之前与Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1246年6月18日在英国德比夏爾可德諾享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾可德諾。

nameMeanings.name: Isolda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The name of the tragic mistress of Tristan in the Arthurian romances. There are several versions of the story. The main features are that the beautiful Isolde, an Irish princess, is betrothed to the aged King Mark of Cornwall. However, through accidentally drinking a magic potion, she and the young Cornish knight Tristan fall in love, with tragic consequences. The story has exercised a powerful hold on the European imagination. The name was relatively common in Britain in the Middle Ages, but is much rarer today.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Isolda Bardolf was born in 1182, in Hoo, Kent, England as the daughter of Miss Bardolf. She married Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor before 1201, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 18 June 1246, in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Isolda Bardolf est née en 1182, à Hoo, Kent, Angleterre, fille de Miss Bardolf. Elle a épousé Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor avant 1201, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 18 juin 1246, à Codnor, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Codnor, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Isolda Bardolf wurde 1182 in Hoo, Kent, England, als Tochter von Miss Bardolf geboren. Sie hat vor 1201 in England Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 18. Juni 1246 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Codnor, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Isolda Bardolf è nata il nel 1182 nel Hoo, Kent, England come figlia di Miss Bardolf. Lei sposato Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor prima del 1201, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 18 giugno 1246, nel Codnor, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Codnor, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isolda Bardolfは1182年にイギリスケントホーオでMiss Bardolfの娘として生まれた。1201年以前にイギリスでHenry de Grey Lord of Codnorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1246年6月18日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアコドノーで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアコドノーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isolda Bardolf(은)는 1182년 영국 켄트 후에서 Miss Bardolf의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1201년 이전 영국에서 Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1246년 6월 18일 영국 더비실르 코드너에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 코드너에 묻혔다.

mn.Codnor, Basford, Derbyshire, England: Codnor, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Isolda Bardolf nasceu em 1182, em Hoo, Kent, Inglaterra filha de Miss Bardolf. Ela casou-se com Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor antes 1201, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 18 de junho de 1246, em Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Isolda Bardolf родилась в 1182 г. в местности ху, кэнт, Англия. Её мать звали Miss Bardolf. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor перед 1201 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 18 июня 1246 г. в местности коднор, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности коднор, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Isolda Bardolf nació en 1182, en Hoo, Kent, Inglaterra como hija de Miss Bardolf. Se casó con Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor antes de 1201, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 18 de junio de 1246, en Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
